# Phoenix El Niño Climate Tracker

## Overview
A minimalist climate analysis node dedicated to tracking atmospheric anomalies, jet stream shifts, and local precipitation deltas in the Phoenix Valley for the 2026-2027 El Niño cycle.

## Core Metrics Traced
- Target Node: Phoenix Sky Harbor baseline tracking.
- Critical Data: Deviation from historical averages (August 2026 – February 2027).
- Project Focus: Regional infrastructure impacts and meteorological anomalies.
